zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Pembridge於大約1335年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾布利其時，他的父親Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight26歲，母親Juliana la Zouche22歲。他於1363年與Elizabeth de Strange在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1375年7月26日在英國賀福爾布利其享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Pembridge于大约1335年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾布利其时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight26岁，母亲Juliana la Zouche22岁。他于1363年与Elizabeth de Strange在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1375年7月26日在英国賀福爾布利其享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: Pembridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pembridge (Herefs), which is recorded as Penebrug(g)e from the 11th to 14th centuries. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pena + Old English brycg ‘bridge’. In some cases the surname may be from Pen Bridge in Shipley (Sussex), which derives from an uncertain first element + Old English brycg.

variants.name: Pember
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Pamber, a habitational name from a place in Hampshire named Pamber, from Old English penn ‘fold, enclosure’ + beorg ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Pembridge was born about 1335, in Pembridge, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight, was 26 and his mother, Juliana la Zouche, was 22. He married Elizabeth de Strange in 1363, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 26 July 1375, in Pembridge, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Pembridge est né environ 1335, à Pembridge, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Juliana la Zouche, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Strange en 1363, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1375, à Pembridge, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Pembridge um 1335 in Pembridge, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight 26 und seine Mutter Juliana la Zouche 22. Er hat 1363 in Shropshire, England Elizabeth de Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Juli 1375 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Pembridge, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Pembridge è nato il circa 1335 nel Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Juliana la Zouche, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Strange nel 1363, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1375, nel Pembridge, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Pembridgeが約1335年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアペンブリッジで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knightは26歳，母Juliana la Zoucheは22歳であった。1363年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでElizabeth de Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1375年7月26日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアペンブリッジで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Pembridge(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 p브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana la Zouche(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1363년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Elizabeth de Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년 7월 26일 영국 허퍼드실르 p브리지에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Pembridge nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Juliana la Zouche, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Strange em 1363, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1375, em Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Pembridge родился около 1335 г. в местности пембридж, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana la Zouche, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Strange в 1363 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 26 июля 1375 г. в местности пембридж, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Pembridge nació aproximadamente 1335, en Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Juliana la Zouche, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Strange en 1363, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1375, en Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
